import json, re, unicodedata, math, sys, os, itertools, statistics
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path="/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path="/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran=json.load(f)
len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:10]

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith=json.load(f)
len(hadith), list(hadith[0].keys())[:20]

import regex as re

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\p{M}\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCTUATION = re.compile(r'[^\p{L}\p{N}\s]')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # remove diacritics
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms to bare alif?
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ء','').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation
    s = PUNCTUATION.sub(' ', s)
    # lowercase - Arabic unaffected
    s = s.lower()
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming on tokens or characters? We'll do characters
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # For performance, use only if lengths moderate
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev=0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            temp=dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j]=prev+1
            else:
                if dp[j] < dp[j-1]:
                    dp[j]=dp[j-1]
            prev=temp
    return dp[m]

def norm_lcs_ratio(a, b):
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    l=lcs_length(a, b)
    return l/max(len(a), len(b))

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    sa=set(ta)
    sb=set(tb)
    tp=len(sa & sb)
    prec = tp/len(sa) if sa else 0
    rec = tp/len(sb) if sb else 0
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

def robust_sim(a, b):
    # combine
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    lcs = norm_lcs_ratio(a_n, b_n)
    f1 = token_f1(a_n, b_n)
    # Weighted average
    return 0.5*lcs + 0.5*f1, lcs, f1, a_n, b_n

orig_full = "وَلَا يَحْزَنْ عَلَيْكَ مَا يَضُرُّهُمْ وَلَا يَحْزَنْ عَلَيْكَ مَا يَنفَعُهُمْ كَذَلِكَ يُبلِغُ اللَهُ أَمْرَهُ قَدْ أَرَکنا بِهِ لِلْقَومِ وَلَوْ شاءَ لَهَدَیَنَاكَ عَلى سَبيلٍ مُسْتَقيمٍ"
snippet = "وَلَا يَحْ...مُسْتَقيمٍ" # Just for record; snippet worthless

print(robust_sim(orig_full, ""))
normalize_ar(orig_full)[:200]

def normalize_ar2(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # map Persian letters to Arabic
    s = s.replace('ک','ك').replace('ی','ي').replace('ە','ه').replace('ہ','ه').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove diacritics
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms to alif; keep waw/ya mapping already done
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ء','')
    s = PUNCTUATION.sub(' ', s)
    s = s.lower()
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def robust_sim2(a, b):
    a_n = normalize_ar2(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar2(b)
    lcs = norm_lcs_ratio(a_n, b_n)
    f1 = token_f1(a_n, b_n)
    return 0.5*lcs + 0.5*f1, lcs, f1, a_n, b_n

normalize_ar2(orig_full)

# Prepare quran texts

# compute similarity to full substring for each

    sims.append((sim, lcs, f1, i, t))
sims_sorted = sorted(sims, reverse=True)[:20]
[(round(sim,3), round(l,3), round(f,3), quran[i]['surah_id'], quran[i]['ayah_id'], t[:60]) for sim,l,f,i,t in sims_sorted]

def get_ayah(sid, aid):
    for rec in quran:
        if rec['surah_id']==sid and rec['ayah_id']==aid:
            return rec['ayah_text']
    return None

for sid, aid in candidates:
    t = get_ayah(sid, aid)
    sim, lcs, f1, a_n, b_n = robust_sim2(orig_full, t)
    print((sid,aid,round(sim,3),round(lcs,3),round(f1,3), t))

# Compute only top 10 to save time

for i, t in enumerate(hadith_texts):

    if sim>0.5:
        best.append((sim, lcs, f1, i, t[:100]))
best_sorted=sorted(best, reverse=True)[:10]
best_sorted, len(best_sorted)

# SequenceMatcher approximate ratio on normalized texts

for i, t_n in enumerate(q_norm_texts):

[(round(r,3), quran[i]['surah_id'], quran[i]['ayah_id'], quran[i]['ayah_text'][:80]) for r, i in top]
